All Yellow Credits is a category where you complete the True Pacifist Ending for the game, while simultaneously doing specific spare ACTs on each enemy encounter you get in order to turn their names yellow in the credits. This is about 12-13 minutes slower than TPE.

Side note: Time is probably inaccurate, i had to retime it very rudimentarily.
